name: Tiingo (Financial Market Data API)
pricing_notes: Free tier: 500 req/hr, 50 tickers; Starter $10/mo; Plus $25/mo; Power $50/mo

auth.notes: API token in header or query param; Authorization: Token <api_key>

performance.notes: REST API; WebSocket for real-time IEX data; historical data fast

agent_readiness.notes: Financial market data: EOD prices, intraday (IEX), fundamentals, crypto, news. from tiingo import TiingoClient. client = TiingoClient({'api_key': key}). client.get_ticker_price('AAPL', startDate='2024-01-01'). client.get_ticker_metadata('AAPL'). client.list_stock_tickers(). WebSocket for real-time IEX Level 1 data. Fundamentals (income statement, balance sheet) for higher tiers. Crypto OHLCV data. Clean JSON responses. Pandas-compatible. Good alternative to Alpha Vantage for affordable market data.

gotchas: Free tier limited to 50 tickers and 500 req/hr
IEX real-time data is consolidated tape (not full exchange data)
best_when: Affordable EOD stock price data for backtesting
Real-time IEX stock quotes via WebSocket
Crypto OHLCV data alongside equity data
Python quant research needing reliable historical data
avoid_when: Full Level 2 order book data needed
summary: Tiingo provides affordable financial market data: EOD equity prices, real-time IEX quotes via WebSocket, crypto OHLCV, fundamentals, and news. Python SDK: TiingoClient({'api_key': key}). Free tier covers 50 tickers. Good alternative to Alpha Vantage for reliable historical and real-time stock data. Fundamentals and broader ticker access on paid plans.
